name: Documentation Expert Bot
description: A RAG-powered documentation bot that queries a Supabase knowledge base using Claude AI to provide expert answers, then posts the response to Slack. Ask any question and get context-aware answers from your docs.

source.originalName: Create a Documentation Expert Bot with RAG, Gemini, and Supabase

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

question.description: The question to ask the documentation bot

tableName.description: Supabase table name containing documentation chunks
